description_long: This is a life-sized figure of a construction worker, depicted standing and looking downward. The worker is outfitted in a yellow safety helmet and a white t-shirt with a visible logo on the chest. He wears blue work pants with reflective yellow bands near the cuffs, held up by dark suspenders, and sturdy black work boots. The figure's left wrist has a red band, and a tool pouch is attached to the right side of the pants. The overall appearance suggests readiness for manual labor in an urban or roadside environment. The clothing and accessories are typical for construction or utility work, emphasizing safety and functionality.
description: A standing construction worker wearing a yellow helmet, white t-shirt, blue work pants with suspenders, and black work boots, equipped with a tool pouch.
description_view_0: Side view showing the worker's head tilted down, suspenders, and reflective bands on the pants.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the logo on the t-shirt, suspenders, and tool pouch on the right hip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the tool pouch more clearly and the worker's profile.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the crossed suspenders and the back of the helmet and pants.
